transcript: Hi! Sorry, yeah, my reception was messing up a little bit. Um, hi!
Um, I’m not sure who this is, I’m sorry.
This is Jeff, the owner of the store. Fantasy Zone.
Uh-huh. This is an adult book store.
No! Um, who are you trying to reach? Do you have a name?
[exhales] [chuckles] Wha—? I don’t think I’ve called your number. I’m sorry.
Yeah, this is Bryan! Can you hear me?
—Uh, what position did, uh, what position did you apply for?
I’m sorry, who is thi—? I—I actually—my phone just rang and it was you. I’m not sure what this is. Uh, [unclear]—
—I’m sorry, did you just call me?

No! No, honestly, my phone just rang and it was you when I picked up. Uh, something about a position I applied for? No joke, I literally just answered the phone. I’m not sure what this is. [chuckles] Sorry.
You’re fine! Um, I guess I’m gonna hang up now. You have a good day—
—[laughs] I’m sorry about. I have no idea.
Da—yeah, David Patton. That’s who looks over the applications. You might wanna try to call Monday mornin’ or Wednesday. He’s here all day on Wednesday. From 9 AM to 1 AM.
Um, okay! I’m sorry, I’m not sure what—I think I just got patched into a call or something.
Um, who is this? I’m sorry. My phone just rang and when I picked it up it was you, so I’m kinda confused. Like, did somebody just call you?
Yes! And then put me on hold—
—I know this is very—Okay! That makes—that literally makes no sense. I’m not sure what that is. Um—
I’m not sure who I’m speaking to. I just answered the phone just now. So I’m sorry. [chuckles]
Um, yeah! But sorry about that! I’m—I’m gonna actually just hop off the phone—
Yeah, who have I got here? I’m sorry.
Um, someone called me tr—lookin’ for a job, I guess. And they clicked over. Not sure.

Oh! Um, oh, so this is a business? Sorry, yester—I’ve been getting weird, uh… That’s happened on my phone a couple times the past few days. I’m not really sure what that is but, I mean, I just—I—my phone rang and I picked up and it was you, just now.
Yeah, and they just said something ‘bout name “Bryan”.
That’s so weird! Yeah, I honestly—I have no idea. I—
‘Cause, yeah, I just—I picked up and it sounds like you were—yeah, you were already on the phone with somebody else.
—That’s not me doin’ that. I’m so fre—
—I have no idea what that is. [chuckles] Please, uh, have a nice day—
